sentences.target: On parle d’un bataillon à la télé.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ paʁl dœ̃ batɑjɔ̃ a la tele/

translations.fr: On parle d’un bataillon à la télé.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ paʁl dœ̃ batɑjɔ̃ a la tele/
translations.en: They're talking about a battalion on TV.
translations.es: Hablan de un batallón en la televisión.
translations.de: Im Fernsehen spricht man über ein Bataillon.
translations.it: In televisione parlano di un battaglione.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在电视上谈论一个营。
translations.pt: Falam de um batalhão na televisão.
translations.vi: Họ đang nói về một tiểu đoàn trên TV.
translations.nl: Op televisie praten ze over een bataljon.
translations.hi: टीवी पर एक बटालियन के बारे में बात हो रही है.
translations.el: Στην τηλεόραση μιλάνε για ένα τάγμα.
translations.nb: På TV snakker de om en bataljon.
translations.id: Di televisi mereka membicarakan sebuah batalyon.
translations.sv: På tv pratar de om en bataljon.
translations.ro: La televizor se vorbește despre un batalion.
translations.da: I tv taler de om en bataljon.
translations.ja: テレビで大隊について話している。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun functioning as the subject.
Finite main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular), agreeing with "On".
Contraction of preposition "de" + indefinite article "un"; introduces the noun "bataillon".
Common noun, singular; complement of "d’un".
Preposition marking location; heads the PP "à la télé".
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for "télé".
Common noun, colloquial for "télévision"; complement of "à".

sentences.target: Je lis l’histoire d’un bataillon local.

translations.fr: Je lis l’histoire d’un bataillon local.
translations.en: I'm reading the story of a local battalion.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo la historia de un batallón local.
translations.de: Ich lese die Geschichte eines örtlichen Bataillons.
translations.it: Sto leggendo la storia di un battaglione locale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在读一个本地营的故事。
translations.yue: 我喺度睇一個本地營嘅故事。
translations.pt: Estou lendo a história de um batalhão local.
translations.he: אני קורא את הסיפור של גדוד מקומי.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc câu chuyện về một tiểu đoàn địa phương.
translations.nl: Ik lees het verhaal van een lokaal bataljon.
translations.hi: मैं एक स्थानीय बटालियन की कहानी पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Διαβάζω την ιστορία ενός τοπικού τάγματος.
translations.nb: Jeg leser historien om en lokal bataljon.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca kisah sebuah batalyon lokal.
translations.sv: Jag läser historien om en lokal bataljon.
translations.da: Jeg læser historien om en lokal bataljon.
translations.ja: 地元の大隊の物語を読んでいます。

tokens.explanation: First-person singular subject pronoun.
Finite main verb in present indicative (1st person singular), agreeing with "Je".
Elision of the definite article (l’ = le/la) before a vowel; article + noun as a single orthographic token functioning as the direct object of "lis".
Contraction of "de" + "un" introducing the genitive-like complement "bataillon".
Common noun, singular; complement of "d’un" within the NP.
Adjective, masculine singular; modifier of "bataillon".

sentences.target: Il rejoint un bataillon de bénévoles demain.
sentences.reading: /il ʁəʒwɛ̃ œ̃ batɑjɔ̃ də benevɔl dəmɛ̃/

translations.fr: Il rejoint un bataillon de bénévoles demain.
translations.ipa: /il ʁəʒwɛ̃ œ̃ batɑjɔ̃ də benevɔl dəmɛ̃/
translations.en: He's joining a battalion of volunteers tomorrow.
translations.es: Él se une a un batallón de voluntarios mañana.
translations.de: Er tritt morgen einem Bataillon von Freiwilligen bei.
translations.it: Domani si unisce a un battaglione di volontari.
translations.zh-Hans: 他明天加入一个志愿者营。
translations.yue: 佢聽日會加入一個義工營。
translations.ru: Он завтра вступает в батальон добровольцев.
translations.pt: Ele vai se juntar a um batalhão de voluntários amanhã.
translations.tr: O yarın bir gönüllü taburuna katılacak.
translations.vi: Anh ấy sẽ gia nhập một tiểu đoàn tình nguyện vào ngày mai.
translations.ar: سوف ينضم غداً إلى كتيبة من المتطوعين.
translations.nl: Hij sluit zich morgen aan bij een bataljon vrijwilligers.
translations.uk: Він завтра приєднується до батальйону добровольців.
translations.hi: वह कल स्वयंसेवकों की एक बटालियन में शामिल हो रहा है.
translations.pl: On jutro dołącza do batalionu ochotników.
translations.el: Αύριο εντάσσεται σε ένα τάγμα εθελοντών.
translations.nb: Han slutter seg til en frivillig bataljon i morgen.
translations.id: Besok dia bergabung dengan sebuah batalyon relawan.
translations.sv: Han går med i en frivillig bataljon i morgon.
translations.ro: Mâine se alătură unui batalion de voluntari.
translations.cs: Zítra se přidá k praporu dobrovolníků.
translations.da: Han slutter sig til en frivillig bataljon i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼は明日ボランティアの大隊に参加します。

tokens.explanation: Third-person singular subject pronoun.
Finite main verb in present indicative (3rd person singular).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner for "bataillon".
Common noun; direct object of "rejoint".
Preposition introducing a noun complement that specifies the type of battalion.
Common noun, plural; complement of "de" in "bataillon de bénévoles".
Temporal adverb modifying "rejoint".

sentences.target: Nous visitons le musée du bataillon.

translations.fr: Nous visitons le musée du bataillon.
translations.it: Stiamo visitando il museo del battaglione.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在参观该营的博物馆。
translations.yue: 我哋正喺參觀嗰個營嘅博物館。
translations.pt: Estamos visitando o museu do batalhão.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tham quan bảo tàng của tiểu đoàn.
translations.hi: हम बटालियन संग्रहालय का भ्रमण कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは大隊の博物館を見学しています。

tokens.explanation: First-person plural subject pronoun.
Finite main verb in present indicative (1st person plural).
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner for "musée".
Common noun; direct object of "visitons".
Contraction of "de" + "le"; preposition introducing the genitive-like complement "bataillon".
Common noun, singular; complement of "du".
